rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF URBAN PIONEER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE I.E. SFUSD SUBSTANTIAL CONTROL OF URBAN PIONEER. (302/AJR/HE)

rulings.Case Title: DARLA MARTIN VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Demurrer To The Third, Fourth And Sixth Causes Of Action In The Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: 1)3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, EXPRESS INDEMNITY OVERRULED. ALLEGATIONS RESPECTING MOU SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS OF AGREEMENT TO SUPPORT CLAIM FOR EXPRESS INDEMNITY. 2)DEMURRER AS TO 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED ON SAME GROUNDS. ALLEGATIONS OF AGREEMENT RE MOU SUFFICIENT. 3)DEMURRER BASED ON STATUTE OF FRAUDS OVERRULED. LANGUAGE OF COMPLAINT BY ITSELF DOES NOT INDICATE IT PERFORMABLE FOR MORE THAN ONE YEAR. (302/AJR/HE)
